data.title: Apple Scrambles To Fix Siri's AI Failures After Public Misstep—Top Executive Admits Marketing It Too Soon Made Things Worse
data.description: Apple is scrambling to fix delayed and underperforming AI-powered Siri features after prematurely marketing them, with a top executive admitting the situation is "ugly and embarrassing" and raising doubts about the company's ability to compete in the fast-moving AI race.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Continues To Offload UiPath, Roblox: Loads Up On GitLab, Ibotta
data.description: Ark Invest's Cathie Wood-led funds made significant trades involving GitLab, Intellia, Prime Medicine, UiPath, Ibotta, Roblox, Repare Therapeutics, and CareDx.

data.title: TikTok Ban Deadline Looms, But Vice President JD Vance Confirms 'High-Level' US Ownership Deal Is Nearly Done
data.description: Vice President JD Vance confirmed that a deal to transition TikTok to U.S. ownership is nearing completion ahead of the April 5 deadline, though final legal paperwork may take longer to finalize.

data.title: Apple's iPhone 16e Outsells iPhone SE By 60%, But Analysts Say It Won't Stop China Sales From Sliding In 2025
data.description: Apple's iPhone 16e is outselling the older iPhone SE by 60%, but analysts say the new budget model won't be enough to stop the company's projected sales decline in China this year.
